title: Design System: AIMA — AI Marketing Assistant

display.purpose: Plus Jakarta Sans 700 — topbar page heading and card titles.

body.purpose: Be Vietnam Pro 400 — all reading and form text; full Vietnamese diacritics.

section-label.purpose: 11px/700/0.08em tracked divider — sidebar group label only.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Default card glow — faint violet halo, flat at rest.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Interactive card hover (.lift-card), paired with translateY(-6px).

shadows.name: nav-active
shadows.purpose: Grounds the single gradient-filled active nav item.

motion.name: spring-nav
motion.purpose: framer-motion spring for sidebar item hover/tap.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Aurora-gradient call-to-action; primary actions and form submits.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: #fff; background: linear-gradient(120deg,#46d6ec 0%,#897ce3 46%,#f083c0 100%); border: none; border-radius: 13px; padding: 16px 24px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 16px 30px -12px rgba(139,92,246,0.6); transition: transform 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease, filter 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-3px) scale(1.03); box-shadow: 0 22px 40px -16px rgba(139,92,246,0.7); filter: saturate(1.08) brightness(1.03); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(-1px) scale(0.99); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.55); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action — white fill, 1.5px border, violet text.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { font-family: 'Be Vietnam Pro', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; color: #6d28d9; background: #fff; border: 1.5px solid #e8e4f1; border-radius: 13px; padding: 15px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.25s ease, background 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease, color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); background: #faf7ff; border-color: #b79df0; color: #6d28d9; box-shadow: 0 16px 30px -18px rgba(124,58,237,0.5); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.45); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Soft Utility Button
components.description: Quiet topbar/sidebar utility button (search, language, home).
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-soft"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#8b5cf6" stroke-width="1.7"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path d="M3 12h18M12 3c2.5 2.7 2.5 15.3 0 18M12 3c-2.5 2.7-2.5 15.3 0 18" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>VI</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-soft { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-family: 'Be Vietnam Pro', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #4b4660; background: #f4f2fb; border: 1px solid #ece8f6; border-radius: 10px; padding: 9px 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s ease, background 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease; } .ds-btn-soft:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: #f1ecfc; box-shadow: 0 10px 20px -14px rgba(124,58,237,0.5); } .ds-btn-soft:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-soft:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8b5cf6; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Primary layout container — white, 20px radius, soft violet glow.
components.html:
Hiệu suất tuần này
Bài đăng của bạn đạt 12.4K lượt tiếp cận trên Facebook và Instagram.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #efeaf8; border-radius: 20px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 18px 38px -34px rgba(80,40,140,0.5); transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.2,0.7,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); border-color: #e3d8f7; box-shadow: 0 30px 50px -28px rgba(80,40,140,0.55); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; color: #211c38; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Be Vietnam Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.55; color: #5b5670; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Labeled icon + input row; faint violet fill, border-shift focus.
components.css: .ds-field { display: block; } .ds-field-label { display: block; font-family: 'Be Vietnam Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #574f6e; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; border: 1.5px solid #e7e2f2; border-radius: 13px; padding: 0 15px; background: #fbfaff; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-input-wrap:focus-within { border-color: #8b5cf6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(139,92,246,0.18); } .ds-input { flex: 1; border: none; outline: none; background: transparent; font-family: 'Be Vietnam Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; padding: 14px 0; color: #241f3a; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8a85a0; }

components.name: Active Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar item — gradient fill + glow when active; soft wash on hover when not.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; width: 232px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; width: 100%; border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 11px 13px; font-family: 'Be Vietnam Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; color: #5b5670; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { transform: translateY(-2px) translateX(3px) scale(1.03); background: #f6f3fc; box-shadow: 0 8px 16px -8px rgba(124,92,255,0.25); } .ds-nav-item.is-active { color: #fff; background: linear-gradient(120deg,#46d6ec 0%,#897ce3 46%,#f083c0 100%); box-shadow: 0 12px 24px -14px rgba(139,92,246,0.8); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8b5cf6; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Platform Chip
components.description: Brand glyph (white) on the platform's brand color — FB / IG / TH only.
components.css: .ds-chip { width: 26px; height: 26px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 8px; color: #fff; } .ds-chip-fb { background: #1877f2; } .ds-chip-ig { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#f9ce34,#ee2a7b,#6228d7); } .ds-chip-th { background: #000; }

components.name: Bouncing Loader
components.description: Signature brand-tinted bouncing-ball loader for auth/data waits.
components.css: .ds-loader { position: relative; width: 120px; height: 90px; margin: 0 auto; } .ds-loader:before { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 30px; left: 50px; height: 30px; width: 30px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(120deg,#46d6ec,#897ce3,#f083c0); animation: ds-bounce 0.5s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } .ds-loader:after { content: ''; position: absolute; right: 0; top: 0; height: 7px; width: 45px; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 5px 0 #e0ddee, -35px 50px 0 #e0ddee, -70px 95px 0 #e0ddee; animation: ds-step 1s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-bounce { 0% { transform: scale(1,0.7); } 40% { transform: scale(0.8,1.2); } 60% { transform: scale(1,1); } 100% { bottom: 140px; } } @keyframes ds-step { 0% { box-shadow: 0 10px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0), 0 10px 0 #e0ddee, -35px 50px 0 #e0ddee, -70px 90px 0 #e0ddee; } 100% { box-shadow: 0 10px 0 #e0ddee, -35px 50px 0 #e0ddee, -70px 90px 0 #e0ddee, -70px 90px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-loader:before, .ds-loader:after { animation: none; } }

narrative.overview: AIMA is a serious tool wearing a bright, optimistic face. The brand lives in a single signature gesture — the aurora gradient (cyan → violet → pink) — which appears on primary actions, the active nav item, avatars, and key brand moments. Everything else is a disciplined, low-noise work canvas: a lavender-tinted near-white ground, white cards, quiet violet-gray text. The color earns attention precisely because it is rare; the canvas stays calm so content, calendars, and analytics read clearly. Built for solo creators and small-business owners who are not marketing experts, it leans friendly and rounded — generous radii, soft purple glows, springy hover — without tipping into toy-like. It should make a one-person marketing team feel supported and in control, never overwhelmed.
keyCharacteristics: One signature gradient (aurora, with sunset / ocean alternates), used as accent, never wallpaper.
Lavender-white canvas (#f7f6fd) + pure-white cards; depth from soft purple glow, not hard shadow.
Friendly geometry: 13–20px radii, full pills for tags/badges, springy micro-interactions.
Dual sans on a contrast axis: Plus Jakarta Sans (display) over Be Vietnam Pro (body).
Bilingual (vi / en) and WCAG 2.1 AA — every animation has a reduced-motion branch.

rules.name: The Rare Aurora Rule
rules.body: The aurora gradient is an accent, not a surface. It carries primary actions, the single active nav item, and brand glyphs — never a full page or card background. Its rarity is what makes it read as 'the brand.'

rules.name: The Legible Muted Rule
rules.body: #5b5670/#6b6680 are the floor for anything users actually read; #8a85a0 and lighter are reserved for large text, single-word labels, and decorative captions. Never set body or placeholder text in the faintest grays — hold WCAG 2.1 AA (4.5:1).

rules.name: The Owned-Platform Rule
rules.body: Platform brand colors are fixed constants from theme.ts (PLATFORM_BG). Never hand-pick a 'close enough' platform color or re-tint to match a theme.

rules.name: The One-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Tiny uppercase tracked labels appear in exactly one role: the sidebar section divider. Do not scatter all-caps kickers above content sections.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: If a resting surface needs a hard shadow to separate from the canvas, the contrast or border is wrong. Shadows respond to state (hover, active, brand emphasis); they don't establish a permanent stacking theatre.

dos: Do drive brand color from var(--brand) and platform color from PLATFORM_BG — never hardcode a gradient string or platform hex inline.
Do keep the aurora gradient to accents; the calm #f7f6fd canvas is the default.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest and let depth come from the soft purple glow on hover/active.
Do set readable text in #1b1730/#211c38 and secondary text no lighter than #5b5670 to hold WCAG 2.1 AA.
Do pair Plus Jakarta Sans (display) with Be Vietnam Pro (body), and add new display strings in both vi and en.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion branch and keep a visible :focus-visible ring.
Do reuse the primitives — Card/cardStyle, Icon/GradIcon, Loader, PlatformTag and the .btn-grad/.btn-outline/.btn-soft/.lift-card classes — before authoring new style.
donts: Don't drift toward the cold enterprise-SaaS dashboard (navy/gray, hard shadows, jargon-dense panels).
Don't collapse into the generic AI-startup template — decorative glassmorphism everywhere, the gradient as wallpaper, interchangeable purple-glow cards.
Don't go childish or gimmicky — no bouncy/elastic easing, no cartoon illustration, no oversized novelty.
Don't over-round: cards top out at 20px, form controls at 13–14px; full pills are for tags/badges only.
Don't pair a 1px border with a wide soft drop shadow as decoration, or use hard 0 2px 4px Material shadows.
Don't add tracked all-caps eyebrows above content sections — the only tracked micro-label is the sidebar section divider.
Don't introduce platforms or platform colors outside Facebook → Instagram → Threads.
